name: Cwmystwyth Mines & Mountain Road
highlights: Ghostly spoil-heaps and ruined engine houses of Wales' largest metal mine, high in the Cambrians.
points_of_interest: Cwmystwyth Lead Mines (Bronze Age to 20th c.); Copper Arch; Kite Country feeding station nearby
food_drink_nearby: The Hafod Hotel; Y Llew Du Aberystwyth (further)
hazards_notes: Mine shafts unfenced — keep children & dogs close; no phone signal
